name: Car Crash X
short_description: Relieve stress with Car Crash X! Smash cars, buses, and motorcycles in chaotic crashes. Watch crash test dummies fly, trigger explosions, and collide with trains or giant hammers. With endless crash scenarios and realistic destruction, the fun never ends! 🚗🔥
detailed_description:
Berk Kalfa, the founder and game developer of Hittite Games, proudly presents Car Crash X!

In Car Crash X, the goal is to relieve stress by creating fun and chaotic car, bus, and motorcycle crashes! With a realistic physics engine, crash test dummies will be ejected from vehicles and scattered around depending on the intensity of the crash.

🚗 Various crash scenarios:

  • Collide with traffic,

  • Crush your car with giant hammers,

  • Experience massive crashes by hitting a moving train!

💥 Realistic crash effects:
Airbags will deploy, vehicles will shatter, and even explode on impact!

🎵 Chaos with music:
If you enjoy high-energy music while creating insane crashes, Car Crash X is perfect for you!

🌍 Endless crashes, unlimited fun:
Explore islands, ports, bridges, and vast oceans to create unlimited crash scenarios. The only limit is your imagination!

🚗🔥 Get Car Crash X now and experience the thrill of ultimate crashes!
